pages.title: Durability modifiers
pages.text: $(item)Superheavy$() — slower swing, higher per-hit damage and durability.$(br)$(item)Softy$() — opposite: faster swing, lower peak damage, gentler durability drain.$(br)$(item)Hollow$() — starts with reduced durability but gains it back over time during use.$(br)$(item)Fragile$() — shatters faster near low durability.$(br)$(item)Decay$() — very slowly degrades even while not in use.

pages.title: Protective
pages.text: $(item)Revive$() — once per life, refuses to break; restores a chunk of durability instead.$(br)$(item)Curvature$() — angles attacks for glancing hits; reduces incoming damage during melee.$(br)$(item)NatureBound$() — regenerates durability while standing on natural blocks (grass, leaves, podzol).
